'''鈭歵-k-ng-v''' ('''katakngevoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:vociferise|vociferise]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| t-k-ng-v
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:vociferise|vociferise]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歵-k-ng-v
|-
! Lemma
| katakngevoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thitakngevoko|thitakngevoko]] || [[word:jitakngevoko|jitakngevoko]] || [[word:shitakngevoko|shitakngevoko]] || [[word:kitakngevoko|kitakngevoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthutakngevoko|thuthutakngevoko]] || [[word:jujutakngevoko|jujutakngevoko]] || [[word:shushutakngevoko|shushutakngevoko]] || [[word:kukutakngevoko|kukutakngevoko]]
|-

|-

|-

|-

|-

|-

|-

|-

|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thatakngevoko|thatakngevoko]] || [[word:jatakngevoko|jatakngevoko]] || [[word:shatakngevoko|shatakngevoko]] || [[word:katakngevoko|katakngevoko]]
